courseTitle: Game Feel, UI, Audio, and Visual Communication
title: Shape Signal Yard
genericDescription: Use color, silhouette, and shape to distinguish roles; design for color vision accessibility; reinforce rules visually.
specificDescription: A rail-yard sorting game where circles, diamonds, chevrons, gates, and stars have unique motion rules and a colorblind-safe hatch mode.
gradingRubric: 30 pts visual language consistency; 20 pts accessibility; 20 pts rule readability; 15 pts aesthetic cohesion; 15 pts notes.
